nasb.text: And again, “I will put My trust in Him.” And again, “Behold, I and the children whom God has given Me.”

esv.text: And again, “I will put my trust in him.” And again, “Behold, I and the children God has given me.”

cnv.text: 又說： “我要信靠他。” 又說： “看哪，我和　神所賜給我的孩子們。”

ccb.text: 又说： “我要倚靠祂。” 还说： “看啊，我和上帝赐给我的儿女都在这里。”

csbs.text: 他又说：“我要依靠他。”还说：“看哪，我和神所赐给我的孩子们都在这里！”
